hero.subtext: The enterprise freelance network for elite developers, designers, and specialists. Post a project and get your top 3 AI-matched professionals instantly.

stats.subtext: ProLinker outperforms every major freelancing platform across every metric that matters to enterprise teams.

ai.subtext: Post once. Our AI scans 691,649 profiles across 50+ compatibility signals and instantly surfaces your 3 best-matched professionals.
ai.feature1Desc: Our AI reads your brief like a human expert — understanding context, nuance, and technical requirements beyond simple keywords.
ai.feature2Desc: Skills, portfolio quality, past ratings, timezone, availability, network trust score, and communication style — all weighted precisely.
ai.feature3Desc: Scans 691,649 profiles and delivers your top 3 perfect matches in under 2 seconds. Start receiving proposals within 24 hours.
ai.feature4Desc: Every match passes through verified identity and invite-chain trust signals — ensuring only the highest quality professionals reach you.

howItWorks.subtext: The fastest path from project idea to verified professional — powered by AI, secured by trust.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your project in plain language. Takes 2 minutes. Free always. Set visibility to public or private to your trusted network only.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our engine scans 691,649 profiles across 50+ signals and instantly surfaces your top 3 professionals — scored, ranked, and explained.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Explore portfolios, ratings, and references. Interview before committing. Hire the right person with complete confidence and zero pressure.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Milestone-based escrow payments. Funds release only when you approve each deliverable. IP ownership guaranteed by automated contract.
howItWorks.joinText: Join 691,000+ professionals already on the network

freelancers.joinDesc: Apply to join our exclusive network of enterprise-ready professionals.

dashboard.subtext: Real-time project tracking, payments, analytics, and team communication — all in one intelligent workspace.
dashboard.feature1Desc: Live updates across your entire team instantly
dashboard.feature2Desc: Track budget, velocity, and freelancer performance
dashboard.feature3Desc: Automated contracts, IP protection, tax forms
dashboard.feature4Desc: Funds release only when you approve deliverables

why.subtext: ProLinker was designed from scratch for enterprise teams who demand quality, speed, and security above everything.
why.card1Desc: Scans 691K+ profiles across 50+ signals. Returns your top 3 in 1.2 seconds.
why.card2Desc: Track team performance with real-time analytics.
why.card3Desc: Average time from post to hire. Industry average is 2 weeks.
why.card4Desc: Every payment held securely until you approve deliverables.
why.card5Desc: Earn passive income by inviting colleagues. No cap on earnings.
why.card6Desc: Top tier client satisfaction across all enterprise accounts.
why.card7Desc: Every professional is verified and vouched for by existing members.
why.card8Desc: Post confidential projects visible only to your trusted network. Competitors never see what you are building.

network.subtext: ProLinker's invite-only network rewards you for growing the community. Earn a percentage of every project completed by your network — forever, with no cap.
network.step1Desc: Share your personal invite link. They join as a verified professional.
network.step2Desc: Your Level 1 invites earn — you get 5% of their project fees.
network.step3Desc: When they invite others, you earn 2% of Level 2 earnings too.
network.step4Desc: Your passive income compounds as your network grows. Forever.

testimonials.subtext: See why 10,000+ companies choose ProLinker over Upwork, Fiverr, and Freelancer.com.

cta.subtext: Join 691,000+ verified professionals and 10,000+ companies already using ProLinker. Post your first project free — no credit card required.
cta.stat1Sub: Ready to start your project today

footer.tagline: The AI-powered professional freelance network. Amsterdam-based. Globally connected since 2012.
